channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania and Italy Reinforce Agricultural Partnership Under Mattei Plan
item.description: Tanzania and Italy have reaffirmed their commitment to enhancing cooperation in agriculture with a focus on improving food security, boosting value addition, and sharing technical expertise. The renew...

item.title: Air Canada Plane Collides with Fire Truck on LaGuardia Runway, Killing Two Pilots
item.description: Surveillance footage captured a tragic collision at New York's LaGuardia Airport on Sunday night, 22 March 2026, when an Air Canada Bombardier CRJ-900 aircraft, operating as Jazz 646 from Montreal, st...

item.title: Tanzania Bolsters Fuel Reserves Amidst Global Tensions
item.description: Mambo yamekuwa poa, lakini mambo ya mafuta yameleta wasiwasi. Serikali imejibu kwa kutoa taarifa kwamba Tanzania ina uhifadhi wa mafuta wa kutosha, hata wakati kuna matatizo duniani kutokana na vita b...

item.title: Australia’s fuel vulnerability exposed by global conflict and long-term policy failures
item.description: The article argues that Australia is dangerously exposed to fuel supply disruptions due to years of policy neglect and failure to meet international reserve obligations. Drawing a historical parallel ...

item.title: CCTV Footage Places Acid Attack Suspect's Alleged Mastermind at First Aid Site for Gospel Singer Mary Claire
item.description: A young gospel artist called Mary Claire, 24, who sings with Redemption Ministers Kenya, an SDA-affiliated group, is fighting for her life at Kenyatta National Hospital after a vicious acid attack in ...

item.title: Rajinikanth clarifies reason for not entering politics, denies DMK threat claims
item.description: On March 17, 2026, Tamil superstar Rajinikanth addressed claims made by Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) general secretary Aadhav Arjuna that the actor refrained from joining politics due to threats fro...

item.title: Ladakhi Leaders Urge Inclusion of Wangchuk in Upcoming Talks with Centre
item.description: Ladakhi leaders have expressed that environmentalist and Leh Apex Body (LAB) member, Sonam Wangchuk, should be part of the next round of discussions with the Central Government. During a gathering org...

item.title: How a Shared Love of Tea Strengthened Our Bond Through Life and Loss
item.description: Don DeWolfe recounts a lifetime of love and shared rituals centred around tea with his wife, Kate. Their relationship began with a rocky first attempt at brewing tea, but over the next 45 years, tea b...

item.title: Daily Superquiz: General Knowledge Trivia for Tuesday, 24 March 2026
item.description: The Age newspaper publishes a daily interactive Superquiz feature, compiled by Chris Berry for Tuesday, 24 March 2026. This longstanding trivia challenge invites readers to test their general knowledg...

item.title: Kashmir Residents Launch Massive Donation Campaign with Cash, Gold and Valuables to Support War-Affected Iran
item.description: In Kashmir, especially in districts like Budgam and Baramulla, people have started a big humanitarian drive to help those suffering in Iran due to the ongoing Iran-Israel war and related conflicts in ...

item.title: UK suspends study visas for women from Afghanistan, Sudan, Myanmar and Cameroon
item.description: The UK Home Office has suspended new study visas for students from Afghanistan, Sudan, Myanmar, and Cameroon, citing concerns over some visa applicants later claiming asylum. This decision has left ma...

item.title: Witness Testifies on Matlala's Alleged Attempted Contact with Deputy President Mashatile
item.description: At the Madlanga Commission, Sergeant Fannie Nkosi, also known as Witness F, testified that businessperson Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala had mentioned plans to meet Deputy President Paul Mashatile in November...

item.title: Marcos Jr. approves DepEd's shift to trimester school calendar starting 2026-2027 amid concerns from teachers
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has approved the Department of Education's proposal to change the public school academic calendar from a quarterly to a trimester system beginning school year 2026-2027....

item.title: Kenyan House Help Wins Court Case After Unlawful Termination
item.description: A former Kenyan house help has been awarded KSh 162,000 by the Employment and Labour Relations Court for unfair termination and related benefits. She worked for five years taking care of her employer'...

item.title: Election Commission clarifies BJP seal on official letter was due to clerical mix-up
item.description: A controversy unfolded in Kerala after a letter from the Election Commission (EC) bearing the seal of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) was circulated on the last day for filing assembly election nomin...

item.title: OnlyFans Owner Leonid Radvinsky Dies at 43 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Leonid Radvinsky, the Ukrainian-American entrepreneur behind OnlyFans, has passed away at the age of 43 following a long fight with cancer. Radvinsky acquired Fenix International in 2018, the company ...

item.title: Leonid Radvinsky, Owner of OnlyFans, Dies at 43 After Long Illness
item.description: Leonid Radvinsky, the billionaire who owned the subscription platform OnlyFans, has passed away at 43 after battling cancer for some time. He bought the majority stake in OnlyFans in 2018 and turned i...

item.title: Jet Fuel Prices Double Amid Iran Conflict, Prompting U.S. and Global Airlines to Cut Flights and Raise Fares
item.description: Jet fuel prices in the United States have more than doubled in recent weeks, rising from approximately $2.17 per gallon to $4.56 per gallon by March 20, 2026, according to the Argus U.S. Jet Fuel Inde...

item.title: Wike Urges PDP Members To Be Confident For 2027 Elections, Slams Defectors Like Makinde
item.description: Minister of the Federal Capital Territory, Nyesom Wike, during the 107th NEC meeting of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) for the party in Abuja, encouraged party members who want to contest for posi...

item.title: UK Summons Iran Ambassador Over Alleged Espionage and Security Threats
item.description: On Monday, Britain waka summon Iran ambassador, Seyed Ali Mousavi, for London over wetin dem call Iran 'reckless and destabilising actions' both for UK and abroad. This action follow as two people – o...
